description: Real-world Python bug benchmark for GuardHarvest evaluation
methodology: Bugs sourced from BugsInPy database, GitHub issue trackers (pandas, flask, requests, django, scikit-learn, youtube-dl, black, httpie, tornado, scrapy), and known CVE patterns. Each file contains a minimal reproduction of the pre-fix code with metadata about the original source.

categories.null_dereference: Access to None-valued variable without guard
categories.type_error: Operation on wrong type without isinstance check
categories.division_by_zero: Division without checking denominator is non-zero
categories.attribute_error: Accessing attribute that may not exist

sources: BugsInPy (pandas, flask, requests, scrapy, tornado, youtube-dl, black, httpie, luigi, tqdm)
GitHub Issues (django, scikit-learn, numpy, sqlalchemy, celery, click)
CVE patterns (yaml.load, pickle, eval injection boundary cases)
